general.title: General
general.subtitle: Manage your profile and account preferences.
general.error_name: Please enter a valid name (minimum 2 characters)
general.error_email: Please enter a valid email address
general.analytics_description: Help improve Dome by understanding how the app is used. Data is completely anonymous.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Customize how Dome looks.
appearance.dark_notice: Dark mode and system sync will be available soon.
appearance.custom_desc: Coming soon — fonts, density, accent colors

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.subtitle: Updates, system preferences and data.
advanced.auto_save_desc: Automatically save your work as you type
advanced.auto_backup_desc: Create backups of your data periodically
advanced.export_import_desc: Move all your data to another device or create a manual backup.
advanced.notes_migration_desc: Migrate old notes to the new domain to enable tree, history and backlinks.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose your preferred language for the interface.
language.select_desc: The selected language will be applied immediately.

ai.title: AI Settings
ai.subtitle: Configure your chat provider, models, and voice transcription.

embeddings.description: Configure the embedding provider for semantic search and the knowledge graph. Independent from chat credentials.
embeddings.reindex_warning: Changing the provider or model will erase existing vectors and reindex your library. Continue?
embeddings.test_unavailable: Embedding test not available in this build

status.not_configured: Embeddings not configured — hybrid search uses full-text and graph only.

ai.models_error: Could not load models. Check your API key and network.
ai.models_configured_only: Only showing models from configured providers.
ai.ollama_install: Make sure Ollama is installed and running.
ai.openrouter_models_error: Could not load OpenRouter models. Check your API key and network.
ai.ocr_notice: OCR on scanned PDFs: model must support vision. Compatible:
ai.dome_connect_desc: Activates the managed provider with the automatic dome/auto model. Open the dashboard, log in and click "Connect Dome Desktop".
ai.copilot_connect_desc: Sign in with GitHub to use Copilot models. A browser window will open; enter the code shown below.
ai.cloud_sync_desc: Requires an active subscription with the cloud_sync feature. Pushes your library snapshot and pulls changes from other devices (LWW by server revision).
ai.brave_desc: Many and agents search the web via HTTP providers (SearXNG/DDG by default; Tavily/Brave if configured).
ai.brave_search_desc: Configure search and fetch backends for agents. Without API keys, SearXNG + Jina Reader work out of the box.

web_search.zero_config_banner: Without API keys, Dome uses SearXNG + DuckDuckGo for search and Jina Reader for fetching pages.
web_search.test_unavailable: Web search test is not available in this environment.

transcription.title: Voice transcription
transcription.subtitle: Speech-to-text (STT): model, compatible API, vocabulary hints, and recording shortcuts.
transcription.hub_floating_note: Meeting capture opens the transcription hub in a panel at the bottom of the main window (microphone button or global shortcut).
transcription.shortcut_dictation_hint: Opens the transcription hub panel — same flow as the microphone button in the top bar.
transcription.groq_key_hint_quick: Groq needs an API key: add it under Advanced below before saving.
transcription.help: Uses an OpenAI-compatible /v1/audio/transcriptions endpoint. Audio is sent to the configured service.
transcription.language_placeholder: e.g. es — leave empty for auto-detect
transcription.api_base_url_help: Leave empty for OpenAI. Enter the origin only (e.g. https://api.openai.com) — the app adds /v1/audio/transcriptions. Paste a full URL only if it already ends with .../audio/transcriptions.
transcription.prompt_placeholder: e.g. product names, technical jargon, speaker context…
transcription.prompt_help: Optional string sent as `prompt` to steer spelling and vocabulary (Whisper-style APIs).
transcription.key_help: If your chat provider is not OpenAI, set a dedicated key here for transcription only. Leave blank to keep the current saved key unchanged.
transcription.shortcut_help: Electron accelerator, e.g. CommandOrControl+Shift+D. Restart may be required. Tray menu “Grabar / dictado” always works.
transcription.pause_help: When the gap between phrases exceeds this length, a new “speaker” block may start. Tune between 0.8–2.5s depending on the recording. Use lower values for fast dialogue.
transcription.capture_help: To capture Teams, Slack, Discord, etc., use the recording dock: choose “System / call audio” and select the meeting window or screen. Dome stores one mixed track; speaker labels are estimated and can be renamed.
transcription.call_chunk_help: Long meetings send audio segments this often for speech-to-text (20–60s).
transcription.hub_default_mode: Initial mode when opening the hub
transcription.preset_groq_desc: Fast Whisper Large v3 Turbo at api.groq.com — add your Groq API key below.
transcription.preset_openai_desc: Classic whisper-1 via OpenAI. Uses your dedicated or app OpenAI key.
transcription.groq_key_help: Required when provider is Groq. Create a key at console.groq.com.
transcription.future_diarization_note: True speaker diarization may be added later; today, speaker turns are still estimated from pauses.
transcription.shortcut_opt_in_help: Global shortcuts are optional. On macOS they can trigger Accessibility / Input Monitoring prompts. You can use the top-bar microphone without shortcuts.
transcription.shortcut_enable_dictation: Enable global shortcut for dictation dock
transcription.perm_screen_restart_hint: After granting Screen Recording, restart Dome for the change to take effect.
transcription.perm_os_managed: Permissions are managed by the operating system.

indexing.title: Indexing
indexing.subtitle: Your configured cloud AI (vision) can transcribe PDF pages and describe images; Nomic embeddings power hybrid search and the semantic graph.
indexing.full_sync_hint: Re-processes each indexable resource: cloud vision transcription where needed, chunking, and Nomic vectors.

embeddings.section_hint: Vector chunks power hybrid search and the semantic graph. Configure the provider in Settings → AI → Embeddings.
embeddings.empty_library: No indexable resources in the library

kb_llm.title: LLM Knowledge Base
kb_llm.subtitle: Automate wiki compilation and health checks per project. Overrides per project are available in the Projects dashboard.
kb_llm.enabled_global: Enable KB LLM for all projects (unless a project overrides)
kb_llm.auto_reindex: Auto reindex semantic chunks on save when KB is active for the project
kb_llm.allow_auto_write: Allow automations to create notes (disable for chat-only output)
kb_llm.expect_good_body:
- You want scheduled runs to compile and link resources into a wiki-style corpus per project.
- You accept LLM token usage for compile and health runs (per your AI provider settings).
- You separate topics using projects and can review runs in Automations / Runs.
kb_llm.expect_skip_title: You can leave this off if…
kb_llm.expect_skip_body:
- You only browse PDFs or chat occasionally and do not need scheduled maintenance.
- You do not want automations to create or update notes on a schedule.
- You prefer to run agents manually from chat instead.
kb_llm.expect_limits_body:
- This is not a separate folder of .md files on disk like an Obsidian vault; it uses Dome resources, notes, and the automation engine.
- Output quality and factual correctness depend on the model and prompts; Dome does not guarantee research accuracy.
- Runs use your configured AI (cloud API keys or local), which may incur cost or load.
kb_llm.projects_hint: Per-project override: open Projects in Home and use the KB LLM dropdown on each project row (inherit / force on / force off).

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.subtitle: Manage plugins installed in Dome. Install new ones from the Marketplace.
plugins.empty_desc: Explore the Marketplace to discover plugins
plugins.install_hint: Select a folder containing manifest.json. You can also install from the Marketplace.

mcp.title: MCP
mcp.subtitle: Model Context Protocol — configure MCP servers, discover their tools and define which ones are globally active for Many, agents and teams.
mcp.mcp_enabled_desc: Enable or disable all MCP servers globally
mcp.no_servers: No MCP servers. Add one or import JSON.
mcp.tools_reused: Reused in Many, agents and teams.
mcp.error_no_servers: No valid servers found in JSON
mcp.error_invalid_json: Invalid JSON. Use mcpServers format or array.
mcp.directory_tree_warning: directory_tree is disabled by default — it can freeze the chat on large folders (especially on Windows). Use Dome native file_tree or file_list instead.
mcp.directory_tree_tool_desc: Recursive tree without limits. Enable only for small folders; prefer native file_tree.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Skills are prompt-driven specializations that Many can use when relevant. Add instructions for specific domains (SQL, legal review, formats…).
skills.subtitle_file: Skills live as SKILL.md files (Claude-style): ~/.dome/skills (personal) and .dome/skills in an optional project root. Edit the YAML frontmatter and body, or use Import/Export JSON.
skills.project_root_help: Set an optional Git/workspace folder; Dome will load .dome/skills next to that project (lower priority than ~/.dome/skills).
skills.edit_help: Full SKILL.md file (YAML frontmatter + Markdown). Save writes to disk; changes apply on the next message.
skills.create_failed: Could not create skill (folder may already exist).
skills.empty: No skills. Add one or import from JSON.
skills.description_placeholder: E.g.: SQL expert. Use when the user needs queries or data analysis.
skills.error_invalid_json: Invalid JSON. Use an array of objects with id, name, description, prompt.
skills.error_no_skills: No valid skills found in the JSON
skills.github_hint: Enter a GitHub repo URL and optional skill name (e.g. pptx). Equivalent to: npx skills add <repo> --skill <name>
skills.no_skills_found: No skills found in that repository.

cloud.title: Cloud Storage
cloud.subtitle: Connect Google Drive to explore and import files directly in Dome.
